violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed bins of food stored on the floor in the walk in freezer.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. A prep cooler containing salad items maintained an internal temperature of 44 F.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. A prep cooler containing salad items maintained an internal temperature of 44 F.
Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Fly spray was stored with other sanitizing chemicals.
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
